description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these Cotton Rib Crew socks from the timberland Earthkeepers' collection. Made of organic material for the environment-friendly, these socks can be worn both - when at work and when on a casual outing - with much ease and comfort.Made of 77% organic cotton, 18% polyester, 3% nylon and 2% elastane for all-day comfort stretchCreated in a classic crew design with rib and jersey stitching for absolute comfortMidfoot arch support and cushioning for superior comfort and durabilityEmbroidered brand logo on the side for stylesock careMachine wash warm in not more than 40 degrees Do not use softeners Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Do not iron
